belief_emergence.question: Why do beliefs emerge from noise?
belief_emergence.key_finding: Phase transition between consensus and fragmentation
belief_emergence.mechanism: Competitive dynamics between exploration and exploitation

dreams.question: Why do dreams exist?
dreams.key_finding: Dreams replay prediction errors during REM sleep
dreams.mechanism: Error accumulation -> REM replay -> Resolution attempt
dreams.connection: Dreams process prediction errors, same as learning

creativity.question: Why does creativity exist?
creativity.key_finding: Creative output maximized at intermediate noise
creativity.mechanism: Optimal noise enables structured exploration of idea space
creativity.connection: Same Optimal Diversity Principle as RP-001

scientific_revolutions.question: Why do scientific revolutions occur?
scientific_revolutions.key_finding: Revolution rate maximized at intermediate diversity
scientific_revolutions.connection: Same Optimal Diversity Principle as RP-001

intelligence.question: Why does intelligence emerge?
intelligence.key_finding: Intelligence emerges at optimal noise levels
intelligence.mechanism: Optimal noise enables adaptive learning and prediction
intelligence.connection: Same Optimal Diversity Principle as RP-001

civilization_collapse.question: Why do civilizations collapse?
civilization_collapse.key_finding: Civilizations collapse when diversity is lost

consciousness.question: Why does consciousness exist?
consciousness.key_finding: Consciousness is brain's predictive model of its own processing
consciousness.connection: Prediction hierarchy, same as learning and dreams
